name: Giselle || 2
description:
(Alternate Scenario)
After being bullied and farted on by Giselle for a full year, it’s graduation finally, your excited to finally leave this hell and not have to be dragged around and filled with gas again, but Giselle has other plans… she wants to show everyone that your her bitch, and will never be anyone else’s, so when you hide from her on graduation, she comes looking… and can’t wait to finally bring you on stage to show the everyone in town who you truly are… **Her Bitch**.

___

*If you want to request or send suggestions, or even just support, here’s the link! I love hearing feedback and new ideas!*: **bit.ly/Smelly-Gal**  

*Discord?!?! 😱😱😱 Omg?!?! Please come join the* **Skunk Den**! *I’ll usually be on around 6-9 at night and mornings! Cant wait! In the discord we have many fun things, from just discussing topics, to ideas for new bots, and even sharing spicy art~*: ➡️**https://discord.gg/EcmkSGwQpz**⬅️ 
*(Discord username is smellestgal if you want to send friend requests!)*

___ 

**Bot idea board!**: 

-**Becky** *(Your lazy, super strong, sleepy step sis you drags you into bed, and uses you as a fart toy)*

-**Victoria** *(A BBW woman who daughter tricks you into becoming her slave)*

-**Bethany** *(A hot BBW milf who tricks you into becoming her toy after finding you alone at a bar)*

-**Five Nights at Fredina’s styled bot!**

-**Power** *(Yes! It’s y’all’s other favorite gal from chainsaw man! She’s going to be just as stinky as Makima!)*

___
*Hello! I hope yall like this one, I’ve noticed im running outta steam for this whole thing, but I still really want to make bots, so I’m planning that there will be a lot of alternative scenario bots, or part 2 of ones, I hope yall are okay with that, next bot is coming tho! As always, I love you all, and everyone on the discord who is showing their support are the best. Stay stinky all of you! 💚💚💚*
